creator: cwmyung@snu.ac.kr
text:
To reproduce the bug, please follow the command (bhyve version 13.0):

```

$ bhyvectl --vm=reproVM --destroy

$ bhyve -s 2:0,ahci-hd,hyfuzz.img -s 3,hda -s 0:0,hostbridge -s 1:0,lpc -c 1 -m 512M -l bootrom,./BHYVE_UEFI.fd -HPA reproVM

```

Assertion failed: (!st->run), function hda_stream_start, file /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/pci_hda.c, line 660.

#0  0x000000080083e2ea in thr_kill () from /lib/libc.so.7

    at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/pci_hda.c:660

    size=-1040170720, val=0x7fffdcbe3ca8, arg1=0x800e3cf00, arg2=0) at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/pci_emul.c:420

    at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/mem.c:162
#10 0x00000000002c0a78 in emulate_mov (vm=<optimized out>, vcpuid=0, gpa=<optimized out>, vie=<optimized out>,

    arg=0x7fffdcbe3ea8) at /usr/src/usr.sbin/bhyve/mem.c:215
